ToolTreaux 13 Pocket Oil Tanned Leather Tool Belt with 2 Hammer Loops, Brown

Featuring high quality leather fabrication, easy belt adjustments, convenient hook on storage and extra-large pockets for primary and secondary tool storage, this tool belt is heavy duty and will stand up to all the wear and tear from construction and building sites, carpentry projects, electrical work and much more!

Key Features

  • 13 COMPARTMENT TOOL BELT: Featuring high quality leather fabrication, easy belt adjustments, convenient hook on storage and extra large pockets for primary and secondary tool storage, this tool belt is heavy duty and will stand up to all the wear and tear from construction and building sites, carpentry projects, electrical work and more
  • HEAVY DUTY LEATHER FABRICATION: Made from oil tanned leather, this heavy duty tool belt is incredibly durable and of high quality; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time
  • DUAL STEEL HAMMER LOOPS: In addition to the ample pocket storage, the tool belt features two steel hammer loops on the outer edges of the large pockets
  • ADJUSTABLE BELT: The leather belt features different size adjustments with more room for additional leather punches if needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Leather; Color: Brown

Product Specifications

  • MPN: L3013QATT
  • UPC: 810058424105
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: Adjustable

Made from oil tanned leather, this heavy duty tool belt is incredibly durable and of high quality; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time. In addition to the ample pocket storage, the tool belt features two steel hammer loops on the outer edges of the large pockets. With space for every tool including deep pockets for nail and screws, a tape measure hanger, pencil holders, hammer loops and more, this large capacity tool belt will give you more than sufficient access to and storage of tools for when you’re on site or taking on personal projects.

FEATURES:

- 2 Large Pockets 9.5 x 7 inches - 2 Medium Pockets 6 x 4 inches - 2 Small Pockets 5.5 x 3.5 inches - 2 Hammer Holders - 1 Tape Holder - 2 Inch Leather Belt - Reinforced Rivets - 4 pencil holders
